requirement_topic.en: KC Mark — Multi-Regime Conformity (KC Safety + KC-EMC + Energy Efficiency Grade)
requirement_topic.zh: KC标志——多制度合格评定（KC安全 + KC-EMC + 能效等级）
requirement_topic.zht: KC標誌——多制度合格評定（KC安全 + KC-EMC + 能效等級）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the South Korean market must bear the KC mark and meet the separate energy efficiency grade obligation. For a standard household refrigerator this means, at minimum: (1) KC Safety conformity under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, tested to KS C IEC 60335-2-24, generally via KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인); (2) KC-EMC conformity under the same Act and RRA framework, tested to KN 14-1 / KN 14-2; and (3) an energy efficiency grade assigned and registered with the Korea Energy Agency under the Energy Use Rationalization Act, with the Korean grade label affixed. If the appliance includes wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), KC certification for radio equipment under the Radio Waves Act (administered by RRA) also applies. KATS (under MOTIE) oversees product safety; the KC mark is applied by the manufacturer or its Korean importer after the required testing and registration. The KC mark must be visible, legible, and durable on the product or its packaging together with the certificate/registration number.
summary.zh: 投放韩国市场的家用制冷器具须加贴KC标志，并满足单独的能效等级义务。对于标准家用电冰箱，至少须：（1）依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得KC安全合格，按KS C IEC 60335-2-24检测，通常采用KC安全确认（안전확인）；（2）依据同一法律及RRA框架取得KC-EMC合格，按KN 14-1/KN 14-2检测；（3）依据《能源利用合理化法》评定能效等级并向韩国能源公团登记，加贴韩国等级标识。若器具含无线连接功能（Wi-Fi或蓝牙等智能家居功能），还须依据《电波法》（由RRA管理）取得无线设备的KC认证。KATS（产业通商资源部下属）监督产品安全；KC标志由制造商或其韩国进口商在完成所需检测和登记后加贴。KC标志须连同证书/登记编号在产品或其包装上清晰可见、可读且耐久。
summary.zht: 投放韓國市場的家用製冷器具須加貼KC標誌，並滿足單獨的能效等級義務。對於標準家用電冰箱，至少須：（1）依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得KC安全合格，按KS C IEC 60335-2-24檢測，通常採用KC安全確認（안전확인）；（2）依據同一法律及RRA框架取得KC-EMC合格，按KN 14-1/KN 14-2檢測；（3）依據《能源利用合理化法》評定能效等級並向韓國能源公團登記，加貼韓國等級標識。若器具含無線連接功能（Wi-Fi或藍牙等智慧家居功能），還須依據《電波法》（由RRA管理）取得無線設備的KC認證。KATS（產業通商資源部下屬）監督產品安全；KC標誌由製造商或其韓國進口商在完成所需檢測和登記後加貼。KC標誌須連同證書/登記編號在產品或其包裝上清晰可見、可讀且耐久。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act — KC Safety (KS C IEC 60335-2-24) + KC-EMC (KN 14 series)
Energy Use Rationalization Act — energy efficiency grade and Korea Energy Agency registration
Radio Waves Act (전파법) — KC certification for radio equipment if wireless connectivity present (administered by RRA)
KATS / MOTIE — product safety oversight and KC mark framework
KS C IEC 60335-2-24 / KS C IEC 60335-1 / KN 14-1 / KN 14-2 / KS C IEC 62552 — underlying technical standards

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no single KC-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于KC的标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於KC的標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Korean conformity package — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any Korean requirement: (1) KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인) test report from a KATS-designated body (KTC, KTL, KTR) to KS C IEC 60335-2-24, plus model registration; (2) KC-EMC test report to KN 14-1 / KN 14-2; (3) energy efficiency grade measured to KS C IEC 62552 and registered with the Korea Energy Agency, with the Korean grade label; (4) KC mark physically applied with the certificate/registration number; (5) Korean-language product markings, ratings (220 V / 60 Hz) and instructions; (6) a Korean responsible party — the manufacturer or a Korean importer who holds the KC certificate/registration and the technical documentation (see row frigkr-market-002). An IECEE CB Scheme report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) may reduce safety re-testing, but national deviations and Korean-language documentation must still be addressed.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立完整的韩国合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何韩国要求：（1）由KATS指定机构（KTC、KTL、KTR）依据KS C IEC 60335-2-24出具的KC安全确认（안전확인）检测报告，并完成型号登记；（2）依据KN 14-1/KN 14-2出具的KC-EMC检测报告；（3）依据KS C IEC 62552测量并向韩国能源公团登记的能效等级，及韩国等级标识；（4）连同证书/登记编号实物加贴的KC标志；（5）韩文产品标识、额定值（220 V/60 Hz）及说明书；（6）韩国责任主体——持有KC证书/登记及技术文件的制造商或韩国进口商（详见frigkr-market-002行）。IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）或可缩减安全重新检测，但国家偏差及韩文文件仍须处理。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立完整的韓國合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何韓國要求：（1）由KATS指定機構（KTC、KTL、KTR）依據KS C IEC 60335-2-24出具的KC安全確認（안전확인）檢測報告，並完成型號登記；（2）依據KN 14-1/KN 14-2出具的KC-EMC檢測報告；（3）依據KS C IEC 62552測量並向韓國能源公團登記的能效等級，及韓國等級標識；（4）連同證書/登記編號實物加貼的KC標誌；（5）韓文產品標識、額定值（220 V/60 Hz）及說明書；（6）韓國責任主體——持有KC證書/登記及技術文件的製造商或韓國進口商（詳見frigkr-market-002行）。IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）或可縮減安全重新檢測，但國家偏差及韓文文件仍須處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC mark (KC Safety + KC-EMC) required before South Korean market placement; energy efficiency grade and Korea Energy Agency registration are also mandatory before sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) / MOTIE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The KC mark (covering KC Safety and KC-EMC) plus a registered Korean energy efficiency grade are mandatory for South Korean market access for household refrigerators. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are entirely separate systems — neither substitutes for the KC mark, KC test reports, Korea Energy Agency registration, or the Korean grade label. Manufacturers must build all Korean compliance documentation independently, in Korean, with a Korean responsible party.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] KC标志（涵盖KC安全和KC-EMC）加上已登记的韩国能效等级是家用电冰箱进入韩国市场的强制要求。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度——均不能替代KC标志、KC检测报告、韩国能源公团登记或韩国等级标识。制造商须以韩文独立建立所有韩国合规文件，并设有韩国责任主体。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] KC標誌（涵蓋KC安全和KC-EMC）加上已登記的韓國能效等級是家用電冰箱進入韓國市場的強制要求。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代KC標誌、KC檢測報告、韓國能源公團登記或韓國等級標識。製造商須以韓文獨立建立所有韓國合規文件，並設有韓國責任主體。

requirement_topic.en: Korean Responsible Party — KC Certificate Holder / Importer (Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act)
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国责任主体——KC证书持有人/进口商（《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》）
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國責任主體——KC證書持有人/進口商（《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》）

summary.en: Under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, a product placed on the South Korean market must have an identifiable responsible person established in Korea. For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside Korea (including China), the KC Safety Confirmation registration and KC certificate are normally held by the Korean importer, or by the manufacturer through a Korean representative. The responsible party must: hold or have access to the KC test reports and technical documentation; appear, together with the KC mark and certificate/registration number, on the product label or accompanying documents; cooperate with KATS and market surveillance authorities; and take corrective action (including recall if necessary) if a product is found non-compliant. Separately, the energy efficiency grade registration with the Korea Energy Agency is made by the supplier (importer or manufacturer's representative). The responsible-party role cannot be satisfied by a freight forwarder, customs broker, or testing laboratory — it must be a legally established Korean entity that holds the documented KC registration.
summary.zh: 根据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》，投放韩国市场的产品须有一个在韩国境内设立的可识别责任人。对于韩国境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，KC安全确认登记及KC证书通常由韩国进口商持有，或由制造商通过韩国代表持有。责任主体须：持有或能够访问KC检测报告及技术文件；连同KC标志和证书/登记编号出现在产品标签或随附文件上；配合KATS及市场监管机构；并在产品被认定不合规时采取纠正措施（必要时包括召回）。此外，向韩国能源公团进行的能效等级登记由供应商（进口商或制造商代表）办理。责任主体角色不能由货运代理、报关行或检测实验室承担——须由持有书面KC登记的韩国合法设立实体履行。
summary.zht: 根據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》，投放韓國市場的產品須有一個在韓國境內設立的可識別責任人。對於韓國境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，KC安全確認登記及KC證書通常由韓國進口商持有，或由製造商通過韓國代表持有。責任主體須：持有或能夠訪問KC檢測報告及技術文件；連同KC標誌和證書/登記編號出現在產品標籤或隨附文件上；配合KATS及市場監管機構；並在產品被認定不合規時採取糾正措施（必要時包括召回）。此外，向韓國能源公團進行的能效等級登記由供應商（進口商或製造商代表）辦理。責任主體角色不能由貨運代理、報關行或檢測實驗室承擔——須由持有書面KC登記的韓國合法設立實體履行。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act — responsible person / KC certificate holder obligations
KATS market surveillance provisions — cooperation, corrective action and recall obligations
Energy Use Rationalization Act — supplier registration with the Korea Energy Agency

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory Korean-style responsible-party obligation. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy Korean market surveillance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类韩国责任主体义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至韩国市场监管要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類韓國責任主體義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至韓國市場監管要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Korean responsible-party obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers selling into the Korean market must ensure a Korean responsible party (importer or manufacturer's Korean representative) holds the KC Safety Confirmation registration and the technical documentation before the first shipment clears. The responsible party's identity, together with the KC mark and certificate/registration number, must appear on the product label or accompanying documentation, and the energy efficiency grade must be registered with the Korea Energy Agency by a Korean supplier. Without a Korean KC registration holder, the product cannot legally be placed on the Korean market regardless of any foreign test reports. KATS market surveillance and customs checks increasingly verify KC registration status, particularly for products sold via online and cross-border e-commerce channels into Korea.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。向韩国市场销售的中国电冰箱制造商须确保在首批货物通关前，由韩国责任主体（进口商或制造商的韩国代表）持有KC安全确认登记及技术文件。责任主体的身份须连同KC标志和证书/登记编号出现在产品标签或随附文件上，且能效等级须由韩国供应商向韩国能源公团登记。在无韩国KC登记持有人的情况下，无论有何境外检测报告，产品均不得合法投放韩国市场。KATS市场监管及海关检查日益核查KC登记状态，尤其针对通过在线及跨境电商渠道进入韩国的产品。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。向韓國市場銷售的中國電冰箱製造商須確保在首批貨物通關前，由韓國責任主體（進口商或製造商的韓國代表）持有KC安全確認登記及技術文件。責任主體的身份須連同KC標誌和證書/登記編號出現在產品標籤或隨附文件上，且能效等級須由韓國供應商向韓國能源公團登記。在無韓國KC登記持有人的情況下，無論有何境外檢測報告，產品均不得合法投放韓國市場。KATS市場監管及海關檢查日益核查KC登記狀態，尤其針對通過線上及跨境電商渠道進入韓國的產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Korean responsible party (importer or manufacturer's Korean representative) must hold the KC registration before any unit is placed on the Korean market; energy efficiency grade registration with the Korea Energy Agency is likewise required of a Korean supplier
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a Korean responsible party under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must ensure a Korean responsible party (importer or Korean representative) holds the KC Safety Confirmation registration before the first unit is placed on the South Korean market, and that a Korean supplier registers the energy efficiency grade with the Korea Energy Agency. This is a hard legal gate under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act — failure to comply exposes the parties to market withdrawal orders and penalties from KATS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须确保在首批产品投放韩国市场前，由韩国责任主体（进口商或韩国代表）持有KC安全确认登记，并由韩国供应商向韩国能源公团登记能效等级。这是《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》下的强制性法律门槛——不合规将使相关方面临KATS发出的市场撤回命令和处罚。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須確保在首批產品投放韓國市場前，由韓國責任主體（進口商或韓國代表）持有KC安全確認登記，並由韓國供應商向韓國能源公團登記能效等級。這是《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》下的強制性法律門檻——不合規將使相關方面臨KATS發出的市場撤回命令和處罰。
